top_signals.title: From supply shock to oil glut: IEA flags scale of demand destruction caused by Iran war
top_signals.summary: The energy supply shock triggered by the Iran War has prompted the IEA to slash its global oil demand forecast.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hong Kong Deals Spring to Life With Over $4 Billion of Listings
top_signals.summary: Hong Kong is on track for at least 17 listings in June — the most since December — that are poised to raise as much as a combined $4.6 billion, with six of them taking investor orders from Wednesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: AO World shifts jobs to South Africa to dodge soaring employment costs
top_signals.summary: Online electrical retailer AO World has revealed it has outsourced most of its sales operations to South Africa in a bid to dodge soaring employment costs. The FTSE 250 firm said it has already moved the majority of its inbound sales business overseas, with the bulk of its customer contact operations to follow next March. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Fresh landfill work begins in Cape Henoko for U.S. base transfer
top_signals.summary: The reclamation work is being done for the planned relocation of the U.S. Marine Corps' Futenma air station from another city in Okinawa.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
